title: WA Robot Agents Configure Dry-Run Response
description: Schema for the data field when calling 'wa robot agents configure --dry-run'. Returns a per-agent plan without writing files.

total.description: Total agents included in the dry-run plan

would_create.description: How many config files would be created

would_modify.description: How many existing files would be appended to or have their FrankenTerm section replaced

would_skip.description: How many targets are already current and would be skipped

errors.description: How many per-agent dry-run planning steps failed

config_kind.description: Generated config file kind (for example claude_md or agents_md)

scope.description: Placement scope for the generated file

filename.description: Target file path; project scope is workspace-relative, global scope is absolute

file_exists.description: Whether the target file already exists

section_exists.description: Whether the target file already contains a FrankenTerm-managed section

action.description: Action that would be taken (create, append, replace, skip, or error)

content_preview.description: Preview of the FrankenTerm-managed content block

error.description: Error message when dry-run planning for this agent failed
